description: Thick smoke observed from open waste burning at Ghazipur landfill site. Residents report severe breathing difficulty.
Heavy dust clouds from ongoing flyover construction on NH-24. No water sprinkling being done.
Massive traffic congestion with heavy diesel trucks idling near Anand Vihar ISBT causing visible exhaust haze.
Multiple factories emitting dark smoke from chimneys in the industrial belt. Strong chemical odor reported.
Fire spotted at Bhalswa landfill. Smoke drifting towards residential areas of Jahangirpuri.
Large-scale construction work on Dwarka Expressway raising dust. Visibility reduced for commuters.
Severe traffic jam at ITO crossing. Hundreds of vehicles idling, creating a thick smog pocket.
Small-scale manufacturing units operating without pollution control equipment. Dark smoke visible.
Open burning of plastic and household waste in vacant plots near Tughlaqabad village.
Metro phase 4 construction near Pragati Maidan generating significant dust pollution. No barriers installed.
Steel re-rolling mills and pickling units releasing fumes without scrubbers. Workers also affected.
Continuous flow of heavy commercial vehicles on GT Road. Road dust combined with exhaust creating poor visibility.
Unauthorized brick kilns operating near Narela. Thick black smoke rising from multiple sites.
Agricultural residue and garbage burning along Najafgarh drain banks. Smoke engulfing nearby colonies.
Multi-storey residential construction without dust-control sheets. Fine particles settling on nearby homes.
